title: fagara nigra
intro: Fagara nigra, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a type of evergreen shrub native to China, characterized by its spiny branches and small, yellowish-green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve pain, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Fagara nigra include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Fagara nigra is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
